events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: spoil pile within 2 ft of edge of trench. OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires spoil piles to be kept at least 2 ft from the edge of the trench. "Within 2 ft" means less than 2 ft, which is non-compliant. This is a fail.
